recovery_clause_text: Tenant pays its Proportionate Share of Realty Taxes, Insurance, CAM/Operating Costs and Utilities, payable monthly with annual reconciliation. Management fee included in CAM at 4% of gross CAM costs. Tenant has audit rights annually.
percentage_rent_clause_text: Tenant shall pay percentage rent equal to 3.81% of Gross Sales in excess of the Breakpoint of $14,695,000.00 per Lease Year. Gross Sales reports due quarterly; annual reconciliation within 90 days of fiscal year end. Landlord has audit rights with 30 days notice.
renewal_clause_text: Tenant has the right to extend the Term for 5 consecutive renewal periods of five (5) years each, on the same terms and conditions, except that Minimum Rent for each renewal shall increase by 7.7% over the prior period. Notice of renewal must be given not less than 12 months prior to expiry.
use_clause_text: Operation of a full-service supermarket and ancillary uses customarily incidental thereto, including the sale of groceries, fresh produce, meat, bakery, deli, prepared foods, household goods, general merchandise, beer and wine where permitted by law, and a pharmacy.
exclusivity_clause_text: Landlord covenants that no other premises within the Shopping Centre, nor any lands within a one (1) kilometre radius of the Shopping Centre owned or controlled by Landlord or its affiliates, shall be used or occupied as a supermarket, grocery store, food market, butcher shop, fish market, fruit and vegetable market, bakery, or for the sale of groceries, produce or fresh meat as a primary use, for the duration of the Term and any renewal periods. FLAG: review for Competition Act compliance.
radius_restriction_clause_text: Tenant covenants that during the Term, neither Tenant nor any affiliate shall directly or indirectly operate, own, or have a financial interest in any other supermarket or grocery store within a 5 kilometre radius of the Premises (the 'Restricted Area'), provided that this restriction shall not apply to any store operating prior to the date hereof.
assignment_subletting_clause_text: Tenant may assign or sublet without Landlord's consent to (i) any affiliate, parent or subsidiary, (ii) any successor by merger, amalgamation or reorganization, or (iii) any purchaser of all or substantially all of Tenant's assets in the Province. Any other assignment requires Landlord's consent, not to be unreasonably withheld.
early_termination_clause_text: No early termination rights other than for Landlord default or casualty/expropriation.
ti_allowance_clause_text: Landlord shall provide a Tenant Improvement Allowance of $35 per square foot of GLA (totaling $1,112,160.00), payable in one lump sum upon Tenant opening for business and delivery of paid invoices and lien waivers.
security_deposit_clause_text: No security deposit required given Tenant's investment-grade covenant.
guarantor: Corporate covenant of Your Independent Grocer or parent entity

assignment_subletting_clause_text: Tenant shall not assign this Lease or sublet the Premises without Landlord's prior written consent, such consent not to be unreasonably withheld, conditioned, or delayed. Tenant shall remain liable under the Lease following any assignment. 50% of any net profit on assignment payable to Landlord.
early_termination_clause_text: No early termination rights other than for Landlord default or casualty/expropriation.
ti_allowance_clause_text: Landlord shall provide a Tenant Improvement Allowance of $15 per square foot of GLA (totaling $38,490.00), payable in one lump sum upon Tenant opening for business and delivery of paid invoices and lien waivers.
security_deposit_clause_text: Tenant shall deposit with Landlord on execution a Security Deposit equal to 3 months Minimum Rent ($30,548.23), held without interest and applicable to the final months of the Term subject to no Tenant default.
guarantor: None

recovery_clause_text: Tenant pays its Proportionate Share of Realty Taxes, Insurance, CAM/Operating Costs and Utilities, payable monthly with annual reconciliation. Management fee included in CAM at 4% of gross CAM costs. Tenant has audit rights annually.
percentage_rent_clause_text: Tenant shall pay percentage rent equal to 3.84% of Gross Sales in excess of the Breakpoint of $21,465,000.00 per Lease Year. Gross Sales reports due quarterly; annual reconciliation within 90 days of fiscal year end. Landlord has audit rights with 30 days notice.
renewal_clause_text: Tenant has the right to extend the Term for 5 consecutive renewal periods of five (5) years each, on the same terms and conditions, except that Minimum Rent for each renewal shall increase by 7.7% over the prior period. Notice of renewal must be given not less than 12 months prior to expiry.
use_clause_text: Operation of a full-service supermarket and ancillary uses customarily incidental thereto, including the sale of groceries, fresh produce, meat, bakery, deli, prepared foods, household goods, general merchandise, beer and wine where permitted by law, and a pharmacy.
exclusivity_clause_text: Landlord covenants that no other premises within the Shopping Centre, nor any lands within a one (1) kilometre radius of the Shopping Centre owned or controlled by Landlord or its affiliates, shall be used or occupied as a supermarket, grocery store, food market, butcher shop, fish market, fruit and vegetable market, bakery, or for the sale of groceries, produce or fresh meat as a primary use, for the duration of the Term and any renewal periods. FLAG: review for Competition Act compliance.
radius_restriction_clause_text: Tenant covenants that during the Term, neither Tenant nor any affiliate shall directly or indirectly operate, own, or have a financial interest in any other supermarket or grocery store within a 8 kilometre radius of the Premises (the 'Restricted Area'), provided that this restriction shall not apply to any store operating prior to the date hereof.
assignment_subletting_clause_text: Tenant may assign or sublet without Landlord's consent to (i) any affiliate, parent or subsidiary, (ii) any successor by merger, amalgamation or reorganization, or (iii) any purchaser of all or substantially all of Tenant's assets in the Province. Any other assignment requires Landlord's consent, not to be unreasonably withheld.
early_termination_clause_text: No early termination rights other than for Landlord default or casualty/expropriation.

use_clause_text: Operation of a retail pharmacy and drug store, including the dispensing of prescription and over-the-counter pharmaceuticals, health and beauty aids, cosmetics, photo finishing, post office services, and ancillary convenience merchandise.
exclusivity_clause_text: Tenant shall be the only retail pharmacy in the Shopping Centre. Landlord shall not lease any premises within the Shopping Centre to any other pharmacy or any business that fills prescriptions. FLAG: review for Competition Act compliance.

renewal_clause_text: Tenant has 2 option(s) to extend, each for a five (5) year term, at the greater of (i) FMR and (ii) the rent payable in the final year of the prior period. Notice required 9 months before expiry.
use_clause_text: Operation of a quick-service restaurant for the sale of pizza and Italian fast food, including drive-thru service where Building permits, and the sale of related beverages and ancillary food items.

percentage_rent_clause_text: Tenant shall pay percentage rent equal to 5.65% of Gross Sales in excess of the Breakpoint of $4,660,000.00 per Lease Year. Gross Sales reports due quarterly; annual reconciliation within 90 days of fiscal year end. Landlord has audit rights with 30 days notice.
renewal_clause_text: No renewal options.
use_clause_text: Operation of a specialty coffee shop and cafe, including the sale of espresso-based beverages, brewed coffee, tea, baked goods, light meals, and packaged coffee for off-premises consumption.
exclusivity_clause_text: Tenant has no exclusivity rights under this Lease.
co_tenancy_clause_text: If Provigo is not open and operating in the Shopping Centre on the Commencement Date, Tenant may delay opening and pay only 50% of Minimum Rent until the Anchor opens; if the Anchor has not opened within 12 months, Tenant may terminate.
assignment_subletting_clause_text: Tenant shall not assign this Lease or sublet the Premises without Landlord's prior written consent, such consent not to be unreasonably withheld, conditioned, or delayed. Tenant shall remain liable under the Lease following any assignment. 50% of any net profit on assignment payable to Landlord.
early_termination_clause_text: If Tenant's Gross Sales for any Lease Year (after Year 3) are less than $650, Tenant may terminate on 90 days notice and payment of unamortized TI/LL Work.,000
ti_allowance_clause_text: Landlord shall provide a Tenant Improvement Allowance of $35 per square foot of GLA (totaling $149,660.00), payable in two installments — 50% upon completion of demising walls and 50% upon Tenant opening for business.
security_deposit_clause_text: Tenant shall deposit with Landlord on execution a Security Deposit equal to 6 months Minimum Rent ($131,658.04), held without interest and applicable to the final months of the Term subject to no Tenant default.
guarantor: Personal guarantee of principal(s) — limited to first 36 months of Term

recovery_clause_text: Tenant pays Realty Taxes and Insurance on a fully net basis. CAM (excluding Realty Taxes, Insurance and Utilities) is capped at a maximum increase of 3.08% per Lease Year on a cumulative basis after the first full Lease Year. Excluded from CAM: capital expenditures, structural repairs, roof replacement, and management fees in excess of 4% of CAM.
percentage_rent_clause_text: Tenant shall pay percentage rent equal to 6.14% of Gross Sales in excess of the Breakpoint of $14,311,000.00 per Lease Year. Gross Sales reports due quarterly; annual reconciliation within 90 days of fiscal year end. Landlord has audit rights with 30 days notice.
renewal_clause_text: Tenant has the right to extend the Term for 4 consecutive renewal periods of five (5) years each, on the same terms and conditions, except that Minimum Rent for each renewal shall increase by 7.7% over the prior period. Notice of renewal must be given not less than 12 months prior to expiry.
use_clause_text: Operation of a full-service supermarket and ancillary uses customarily incidental thereto, including the sale of groceries, fresh produce, meat, bakery, deli, prepared foods, household goods, general merchandise, beer and wine where permitted by law, and a pharmacy.
exclusivity_clause_text: Landlord covenants that no other premises within the Shopping Centre, nor any lands within a one (1) kilometre radius of the Shopping Centre owned or controlled by Landlord or its affiliates, shall be used or occupied as a supermarket, grocery store, food market, butcher shop, fish market, fruit and vegetable market, bakery, or for the sale of groceries, produce or fresh meat as a primary use, for the duration of the Term and any renewal periods. FLAG: review for Competition Act compliance.
radius_restriction_clause_text: Tenant covenants that during the Term, neither Tenant nor any affiliate shall directly or indirectly operate, own, or have a financial interest in any other supermarket or grocery store within a 5 kilometre radius of the Premises (the 'Restricted Area'), provided that this restriction shall not apply to any store operating prior to the date hereof.
assignment_subletting_clause_text: Tenant may assign or sublet without Landlord's consent to (i) any affiliate, parent or subsidiary, (ii) any successor by merger, amalgamation or reorganization, or (iii) any purchaser of all or substantially all of Tenant's assets in the Province. Any other assignment requires Landlord's consent, not to be unreasonably withheld.
early_termination_clause_text: No early termination rights other than for Landlord default or casualty/expropriation.
ti_allowance_clause_text: Premises delivered in as-is, where-is condition. Tenant responsible for all leasehold improvements at its sole cost.
security_deposit_clause_text: No security deposit required given Tenant's investment-grade covenant.
guarantor: Corporate covenant of Provigo or parent entity

Notice of renewal must be given not less than 12 months prior to expiry.
use_clause_text: Operation of a full-service supermarket and ancillary uses customarily incidental thereto, including the sale of groceries, fresh produce, meat, bakery, deli, prepared foods, household goods, general merchandise, beer and wine where permitted by law, and a pharmacy.
exclusivity_clause_text: Landlord covenants that no other premises within the Shopping Centre, nor any lands within a one (1) kilometre radius of the Shopping Centre owned or controlled by Landlord or its affiliates, shall be used or occupied as a supermarket, grocery store, food market, butcher shop, fish market, fruit and vegetable market, bakery, or for the sale of groceries, produce or fresh meat as a primary use, for the duration of the Term and any renewal periods. FLAG: review for Competition Act compliance.
radius_restriction_clause_text: Tenant covenants that during the Term, neither Tenant nor any affiliate shall directly or indirectly operate, own, or have a financial interest in any other supermarket or grocery store within a 5 kilometre radius of the Premises (the 'Restricted Area'), provided that this restriction shall not apply to any store operating prior to the date hereof.
assignment_subletting_clause_text: Tenant may assign or sublet without Landlord's consent to (i) any affiliate, parent or subsidiary, (ii) any successor by merger, amalgamation or reorganization, or (iii) any purchaser of all or substantially all of Tenant's assets in the Province. Any other assignment requires Landlord's consent, not to be unreasonably withheld.
early_termination_clause_text: No early termination rights other than for Landlord default or casualty/expropriation.
ti_allowance_clause_text: Premises delivered in as-is condition. No tenant improvement allowance.
security_deposit_clause_text: No security deposit required given Tenant's investment-grade covenant.
guarantor: Corporate covenant of Zehrs or parent entity

rent_escalation_summary: Annual fixed escalator of 2.8% per year
recovery_clause_text: Tenant pays its Proportionate Share of Realty Taxes, Insurance, CAM/Operating Costs and Utilities, payable monthly with annual reconciliation. Management fee included in CAM at 4% of gross CAM costs. Tenant has audit rights annually.
renewal_clause_text: Tenant has 1 option(s) to extend, each for a five (5) year term, at the greater of (i) FMR and (ii) the rent payable in the final year of the prior period. Notice required 9 months before expiry.
use_clause_text: Operation of a full-service retail banking branch, including ATM services, safe deposit boxes, financial advisory services, mortgage origination, and small business banking.
exclusivity_clause_text: No other full-service retail bank branch shall be permitted within the Shopping Centre during the initial Term. ATMs operated by other financial institutions are permitted.
co_tenancy_clause_text: If Zehrs ceases operations and the premises remain dark for more than 180 consecutive days, Tenant shall pay reduced rent equal to the lesser of (i) Minimum Rent or (ii) 4% of Gross Sales until a Replacement Anchor (a national/regional grocery chain operating ≥25,000 sf) opens. If no Replacement Anchor opens within 18 months, Tenant may terminate on 60 days' notice.
assignment_subletting_clause_text: Tenant shall not assign this Lease or sublet the Premises without Landlord's prior written consent, such consent not to be unreasonably withheld, conditioned, or delayed. Tenant shall remain liable under the Lease following any assignment. 50% of any net profit on assignment payable to Landlord.
early_termination_clause_text: No early termination rights other than for Landlord default or casualty/expropriation.
ti_allowance_clause_text: Landlord shall provide a Tenant Improvement Allowance of $65 per square foot of GLA (totaling $239,265.00), payable in one lump sum upon Tenant opening for business and delivery of paid invoices and lien waivers.
security_deposit_clause_text: Tenant shall deposit with Landlord on execution a Security Deposit equal to 3 months Minimum Rent ($46,610.66), held without interest and applicable to the final months of the Term subject to no Tenant default.
guarantor: Personal guarantee of principal(s) — limited to first 24 months of Term

renewal_clause_text: Tenant has 3 option(s) to extend, each for a five (5) year term, at the greater of (i) FMR and (ii) the rent payable in the final year of the prior period. Notice required 9 months before expiry.
use_clause_text: Operation of a retail pharmacy and drug store, including the dispensing of prescription and over-the-counter pharmaceuticals, health and beauty aids, cosmetics, photo finishing, post office services, and ancillary convenience merchandise.
exclusivity_clause_text: Tenant shall be the only retail pharmacy in the Shopping Centre. Landlord shall not lease any premises within the Shopping Centre to any other pharmacy or any business that fills prescriptions. FLAG: review for Competition Act compliance.
assignment_subletting_clause_text: Any assignment or subletting requires Landlord's prior written consent in its sole and absolute discretion. Tenant remains liable for all obligations.
early_termination_clause_text: No early termination rights other than for Landlord default or casualty/expropriation.
ti_allowance_clause_text: Landlord shall provide a Tenant Improvement Allowance of $25 per square foot of GLA (totaling $403,325.00), payable in one lump sum upon Tenant opening for business and delivery of paid invoices and lien waivers.
security_deposit_clause_text: Tenant shall deposit with Landlord on execution a Security Deposit equal to 3 months Minimum Rent ($167,420.21), held without interest and applicable to the final months of the Term subject to no Tenant default.
guarantor: None

recovery_clause_text: Tenant pays its Proportionate Share of Realty Taxes, Insurance, CAM/Operating Costs and Utilities, payable monthly with annual reconciliation. Management fee included in CAM at 4% of gross CAM costs. Tenant has audit rights annually.
percentage_rent_clause_text: Tenant shall pay percentage rent equal to 4.4% of Gross Sales in excess of the Breakpoint of $22,171,000.00 per Lease Year. Gross Sales reports due quarterly; annual reconciliation within 90 days of fiscal year end. Landlord has audit rights with 30 days notice.

exclusivity_clause_text: Landlord covenants that no other premises within the Shopping Centre, nor any lands within a one (1) kilometre radius of the Shopping Centre owned or controlled by Landlord or its affiliates, shall be used or occupied as a supermarket, grocery store, food market, butcher shop, fish market, fruit and vegetable market, bakery, or for the sale of groceries, produce or fresh meat as a primary use, for the duration of the Term and any renewal periods. radius_restriction_clause_text: Tenant covenants that during the Term, neither Tenant nor any affiliate shall directly or indirectly operate, own, or have a financial interest in any other supermarket or grocery store within a 5 kilometre radius of the Premises (the 'Restricted Area'), provided that this restriction shall not apply to any store operating prior to the date hereof.
assignment_subletting_clause_text: Tenant may assign or sublet without Landlord's consent to (i) any affiliate, parent or subsidiary, (ii) any successor by merger, amalgamation or reorganization, or (iii) any purchaser of all or substantially all of Tenant's assets in the Province. Any other assignment requires Landlord's consent, not to be unreasonably withheld.
early_termination_clause_text: Tenant has a one-time right to terminate the Lease effective on the 10th anniversary of the Commencement Date, on 12 months prior written notice and payment of a Termination Fee equal to 6 months Minimum Rent plus unamortized Landlord's Work and TI Allowance.
ti_allowance_clause_text: Premises delivered in as-is condition. No tenant improvement allowance.
security_deposit_clause_text: No security deposit required given Tenant's investment-grade covenant.
guarantor: Corporate covenant of Provigo or parent entity

use_clause_text: Operation of a full-service supermarket and ancillary uses customarily incidental thereto, including the sale of groceries, fresh produce, meat, bakery, deli, prepared foods, household goods, general merchandise, beer and wine where permitted by law, and a pharmacy.
exclusivity_clause_text: Landlord covenants that no other premises within the Shopping Centre, nor any lands within a one (1) kilometre radius of the Shopping Centre owned or controlled by Landlord or its affiliates, shall be used or occupied as a supermarket, grocery store, food market, butcher shop, fish market, fruit and vegetable market, bakery, or for the sale of groceries, produce or fresh meat as a primary use, for the duration of the Term and any renewal periods. FLAG: review for Competition Act compliance.

percentage_rent_clause_text: Tenant shall pay percentage rent equal to 4.59% of Gross Sales in excess of the Breakpoint of $1,496,000.00 per Lease Year. Gross Sales reports due quarterly; annual reconciliation within 90 days of fiscal year end. Landlord has audit rights with 30 days notice.
renewal_clause_text: Tenant has 3 option(s) to extend, each for a five (5) year term, at the greater of (i) FMR and (ii) the rent payable in the final year of the prior period. Notice required 9 months before expiry.
use_clause_text: Operation of a quick-service restaurant for the sale of submarine sandwiches and salads, including drive-thru service where Building permits, and the sale of related beverages and ancillary food items.
exclusivity_clause_text: Tenant has no exclusivity rights under this Lease.
co_tenancy_clause_text: If T&T Supermarket ceases operations and the premises remain dark for more than 180 consecutive days, Tenant shall pay reduced rent equal to the lesser of (i) Minimum Rent or (ii) 4% of Gross Sales until a Replacement Anchor (a national/regional grocery chain operating ≥25,000 sf) opens. If no Replacement Anchor opens within 18 months, Tenant may terminate on 60 days' notice.
assignment_subletting_clause_text: Tenant shall not assign this Lease or sublet the Premises without Landlord's prior written consent, such consent not to be unreasonably withheld, conditioned, or delayed. Tenant shall remain liable under the Lease following any assignment. 50% of any net profit on assignment payable to Landlord.
early_termination_clause_text: No early termination rights other than for Landlord default or casualty/expropriation.
ti_allowance_clause_text: Landlord shall provide a Tenant Improvement Allowance of $50 per square foot of GLA (totaling $96,300.00), payable in two installments — 50% upon completion of demising walls and 50% upon Tenant opening for business.
security_deposit_clause_text: Tenant shall deposit with Landlord on execution a Security Deposit equal to 6 months Minimum Rent ($34,340.58), held without interest and applicable to the final months of the Term subject to no Tenant default.
guarantor: None

early_termination_clause_text: No early termination rights other than for Landlord default or casualty/expropriation.
ti_allowance_clause_text: Premises delivered in as-is condition. No tenant improvement allowance.
security_deposit_clause_text: No security deposit required given Tenant's investment-grade covenant.
guarantor: Corporate covenant of Your Independent Grocer or parent entity

Notice of renewal must be given not less than 12 months prior to expiry.
use_clause_text: Operation of a full-service supermarket and ancillary uses customarily incidental thereto, including the sale of groceries, fresh produce, meat, bakery, deli, prepared foods, household goods, general merchandise, beer and wine where permitted by law, and a pharmacy.
exclusivity_clause_text: Landlord covenants that no other premises within the Shopping Centre, nor any lands within a one (1) kilometre radius of the Shopping Centre owned or controlled by Landlord or its affiliates, shall be used or occupied as a supermarket, grocery store, food market, butcher shop, fish market, fruit and vegetable market, bakery, or for the sale of groceries, produce or fresh meat as a primary use, for the duration of the Term and any renewal periods. FLAG: review for Competition Act compliance.
radius_restriction_clause_text: Tenant covenants that during the Term, neither Tenant nor any affiliate shall directly or indirectly operate, own, or have a financial interest in any other supermarket or grocery store within a 3 kilometre radius of the Premises (the 'Restricted Area'), provided that this restriction shall not apply to any store operating prior to the date hereof.
assignment_subletting_clause_text: Tenant may assign or sublet without Landlord's consent to (i) any affiliate, parent or subsidiary, (ii) any successor by merger, amalgamation or reorganization, or (iii) any purchaser of all or substantially all of Tenant's assets in the Province. Any other assignment requires Landlord's consent, not to be unreasonably withheld.
early_termination_clause_text: No early termination rights other than for Landlord default or casualty/expropriation.
ti_allowance_clause_text: Landlord shall provide a Tenant Improvement Allowance of $25 per square foot of GLA (totaling $920,425.00), payable in two installments — 50% upon completion of demising walls and 50% upon Tenant opening for business.
security_deposit_clause_text: No security deposit required given Tenant's investment-grade covenant.
guarantor: Corporate covenant of Loblaws or parent entity

rent_escalation_summary: Annual fixed escalator of 3.46% per year
recovery_clause_text: Tenant pays its Proportionate Share of Realty Taxes, Insurance, CAM/Operating Costs and Utilities, payable monthly with annual reconciliation. Management fee included in CAM at 4% of gross CAM costs. Tenant has audit rights annually.
renewal_clause_text: Tenant has 1 option(s) to extend, each for a five (5) year term, at the greater of (i) FMR and (ii) the rent payable in the final year of the prior period. Notice required 9 months before expiry.
use_clause_text: Operation of a retail telecommunications store, including the sale and activation of mobile devices, wireless plans, and accessories.
exclusivity_clause_text: Tenant has no exclusivity rights under this Lease.
co_tenancy_clause_text: If Dollarama ceases operations and the premises remain dark for more than 180 consecutive days, Tenant shall pay reduced rent equal to the lesser of (i) Minimum Rent or (ii) 4% of Gross Sales until a Replacement Anchor (a national/regional grocery chain operating ≥25,000 sf) opens. If no Replacement Anchor opens within 18 months, Tenant may terminate on 60 days' notice.
assignment_subletting_clause_text: Any assignment or subletting requires Landlord's prior written consent in its sole and absolute discretion. Tenant remains liable for all obligations.
early_termination_clause_text: No early termination rights other than for Landlord default or casualty/expropriation.
ti_allowance_clause_text: Premises delivered in as-is condition. No tenant improvement allowance.
security_deposit_clause_text: Tenant shall deposit with Landlord on execution a Security Deposit equal to 2 months Minimum Rent ($25,067.33), held without interest and applicable to the final months of the Term subject to no Tenant default.
guarantor: None
